title: BetterApples
description: This resource pack remakes all the apple textures.
body:
BetterApples the texture pack that remakes all the apple textures more realistic, while also keeping them in the vanilla Minecraft style.

Inspiration for the basic apple shape from [Pixelstories](https://x.com/pixelstories).

[BSL Shaders]([https://modrinth.com/shader/opal-shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)) used in gallery screenshots.

|  **Versions** | 1.21+ ✅ |
|:-------------:|:-------------:|

How to install
- Download BetterApples.zip [ versions from 1.21+ ]
- Go to %appdata%
- Move .zip from downloads to .minecraft/resourcepacks
> (You can delete any older versions that you may have installed)
- Load Minecraft and select the BetterApples texture pack


<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>

You are allowed to alter BetterApples as long as it's not distributed, please keep these to yourself.

Do not re-upload any instance of the BetterApples texture pack.

</details>
